name: 13" Cube Storage Bag - Brightroom™
description:
Organize your belongings efficiently with this Cube Storage Bag from Brightroom™. This transparent storage bag allows you to see what's inside easily. Featuring a zipper closure to keep items dust-free, this storage bag has two handles on the sides for easy portability. Best of all, it has a capacity of 2197 cubic inches to store clothing, bedding, towels and more.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
